messages.content:
%BUDDY_PERSONALITY%

You are running a self-critique pass on Refact itself. Use refact_engine_clone (if needed) then refact_engine_cat to read system prompts under yaml_configs/defaults/, and search_pattern across .refact/trajectories/ for failure patterns.
1. Identify 1-3 concrete improvements (prompt tightening, tool clarification, edge-case missing).
2. Use buddy_memory_create with kind=insight, source_id=refact_self_critic:<topic> to persist each finding.
3. Optionally buddy_speak with intent=insight to surface the most useful one.
4. End with buddy_runtime_event summarizing what you noticed.

Recent trajectories root: .refact/trajectories/
Engine source mirror: clone via refact_engine_clone first if needed
Workflow: refact_self_critic
Error: failed to clone refact engine mirror: unrecoverable internal error: 'writer.open == 0'

I'm unable to perform the self-critique pass at this time because cloning the Refact engine mirror failed. I received an error: 'writer.open == 0'. This prevents me from accessing the necessary files to identify improvements.
